SessionStart.command: command -v uv > /dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'WARNING: uv is not installed. This plugin requires uv for dependency management. Run: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh'

UserPromptSubmit.prompt: Before proceeding, remember: separate extraction from synthesis. Preserve source anchors (file, section, page) on every finding. Do not collapse raw evidence into inferred conclusions until extraction is complete.

Stop.prompt: Review the response you just produced. If it is a substantive analysis (not a simple factual answer or short clarification), check whether it includes: (1) explicit assumptions, (2) top risks, (3) unresolved questions, and (4) recommended next steps. If any of these are missing, append a brief note flagging what was omitted and why it matters.
